problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light may resolve What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
